CoreValueProposition: Real-time app configuration management across all screens, providing full control of the user experience without needing to touch the code [1, 2].
AdvancedFeaturesAndFunctionality: Remote configuration and localized text updates [2]
Previewing and whitelisting in controlled environments [2]
Audience segmentation and multivariate A/B testing [2, 3]
Team management and administrative roles with defined Security Groups [4]
Consumption (Read) and Management (Write) APIs for integrating with custom business workflows [5]
PlatformReach: Orchestrates client applications across all screens [1, 6]

CoreValueProposition: A Cross-platform Development Kit (XDK) that abstracts connected TV (CTV) applications from underlying devices, enabling a 'build once, deploy to many' approach for faster time-to-market [8, 9].
AdvancedFeaturesAndFunctionality: Modular, extensible, JavaScript-based architecture [8]
Well-architected device abstraction layer [10]
Input controls and focus management [10]
Native player integration and local storage capabilities [10]
Fully decoupled responsive UI layer for efficient maintenance [10]
PlatformReach: Consoles: PS4, PS5, Xbox One, Xbox Series S/X [11]. CTVs: LG webOS, Tizen, Amazon FireTV, AndroidTV, Vizio, Hisense, Panasonic, Sharp, Toshiba, Opera TV [11, 12]. Set-Top Boxes: Xfinity X1, Sky, Freeview, Foxxum, TiVo, Vewd, YouView [11].

CoreValueProposition: A native sports framework designed to fast-track the launch of premium, bespoke sports applications focused on boosting engagement through social interactivity [14, 15].
AdvancedFeaturesAndFunctionality: Real-time live stats and scores via customizable widgets [13, 16]
In-video live chat, influencer chat, and personal chat rooms [17, 18]
Optimized 10-foot user experience (easy navigation, discoverability, personalization) [19]
Betting integrations [16]
Multiscreen live channels, virtual channels, and custom video players [20]
Integrated e-commerce, OTT ticket purchases, and membership upsells [21]
PlatformReach: Multi-platform support across all major OTT platforms [14, 15]

CoreValueProposition: An AI-native orchestration platform purpose-built for OTT streaming services to stabilize quality, combat churn, and enable real-time innovation [23, 24].
AdvancedFeaturesAndFunctionality: AI-native architecture powered by intelligent agents that learn, adapt, and make autonomous decisions [25]
Data-first unification layer pulling real-time data from CDNs, devices, analytics, CRM, and billing [26]
Modular impact agent marketplace for rapid deployment of pre-built workflows [25, 26]
Predictive monitoring with automated P2P streaming fallback and CDN failover [27, 28]
Predictive churn intelligence and personalized retention actions [29]
Real-time dynamic UI personalization and curated content assembly [30]
PlatformReach: Can be layered onto the Accedo Assemble platform or added to an existing tech stack via flexible APIs and connectors [31]. It is battle-tested to deploy across millions of devices [32].
